name: Sensational Peppermint Pattie Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit (325 degrees Fahrenheit for a glass baking dish).
2. Remove wrappers from peppermint patties.
3. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
4. In a large bowl, stir together melted butter, sugar, and vanilla extract.
5. Add eggs; beat until well blended.
6. Stir in flour, cocoa, baking powder, and salt; blend well.
7. Reserve 2 cups of the batter.
8. Spread the remaining batter in the prepared pan.
9. Arrange peppermint patties about 1/2 inch apart in a single layer over the batter.
10. Spread the reserved 2 cups of batter over the patties.
11. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes, or until the brownies begin to pull away from the sides of the pan.
12. Allow the brownies to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack before cutting into squares.
13. Approximately 36 brownies are produced.
